items.example: Auctions make us compete, and when we start competing, we want to win.
Learning a new language is a challenge that takes time and patience.
There has always been a friendly rivalry between the two teams.
She defeated her opponent in the final round of the competition.
We need to beat our competitors to win the contract.
He refused to accept defeat and tried again.
You bid more just so you can come out on top.
I'm ready to take on any challenge that comes my way.
